sourceNote: TCGplayer Authentication Center study, read directly from the primary article (Peter Day, updated 2025-02-27): more than 8,000 Twilight Masquerade booster packs opened, per-tier rates published with 95% confidence intervals — Double Rare 16.93% ±0.79, Ultra Rare 6.61% ±0.52, ACE SPEC 5.06% ±0.46, Illustration Rare 7.73% ±0.56, Special Illustration Rare 1.17% ±0.23, Hyper Rare 0.68% ±0.17. The study validates our uniform-within-tier assumption: every individual card's measured rate fit within the 95% CI for its rarity. TCGplayer notes the pull rates are effectively identical to Temporal Forces and Stellar Crown by design; the small differences are within the confidence intervals. Twilight Masquerade has the largest Secret Rare pool of the three (59 cards), so a specific chase card — e.g. SIR Greninja ex at 1 in 941 packs — is the hardest to hit of the trio despite matching per-tier odds.
